title: TransferOperation
description: Operation contract for file Download and Upload operations initiated from a local surface. Downloads must use scoped destination paths. Uploads must have an explicit operationId and must not bypass audit. Both directions require evidence emission.

direction.description: Transfer direction from the local device's perspective.

source.description: For downloads: the remote URL or URI. For uploads: the local file path (must be within an allowed filesystem root).

destination.description: For downloads: the local destination path (must be scoped, e.g. ~/Downloads/SourceOS/agent-downloads/<operationId>/). For uploads: the remote URL or URI.

checksum.description: SHA-256 checksum of the transferred content (hex). Required when status=completed.

fileAvailabilityState.description: File availability state of the destination after transfer completes.
